query: INSERT INTO tenant_theme (tenant_id, brand_name, logo_storage_key, logo_content_type, logo_bytes_size) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id) DO UPDATE SET logo_storage_key  = EXCLUDED.logo_storage_key, logo_content_type = EXCLUDED.logo_content_type, logo_bytes_size   = EXCLUDED.logo_bytes_size
